source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit that adds the score32 exp-LUT HBM/DRAM service-closure audit hook.

requested_items.objective: Audit score32-specific HBM/DRAM service latency and calibrated HBM energy for the promoted Llama7B attention frontier row.

expected_result.reason: The result should state whether score32-specific HBM/DRAM service latency or calibrated HBM energy changes the current frontier account before moving to remaining controller/signoff abstractions.
